member.name: T:UnityEngine.Rendering.GPUResidentDrawer
member.summary: Static utility class for updating data post cull in begin camera rendering

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.GPUResidentDrawer.IsInstanceOcclusionCullingEnabled
member.summary: Utility function to test if instance occlusion culling is enabled
member.returns: True if instance occlusion culling is enabled

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.GPUResidentDrawer.PostCullBeginCameraRendering(UnityEngine.Rendering.RenderRequestBatcherContext)
member.summary: Utility function for updating data post cull in begin camera rendering
member.param: Context containing the data to be set

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.GPUResidentDrawer.OnSetupAmbientProbe
member.summary: Utility function for updating probe data after global ambient probe is set up

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.GPUResidentDrawer.InstanceOcclusionTest(UnityEngine.Rendering.RenderGraphModule.RenderGraph,UnityEngine.Rendering.OcclusionCullingSettings@,System.ReadOnlySpan{UnityEngine.Rendering.SubviewOcclusionTest})
member.summary: Utility function to run an occlusion test in compute to update indirect draws. This function will dispatch compute shaders to run the given occlusion test and update all indirect draws in the culling output for the given view. The next time a renderer list that uses this culling output is drawn, these indirect draw commands will contain only the instances that passed the given occlusion test.
member.param: Render graph that will have a compute pass added.
The view to update and occlusion test to use.
Specifies the occluder subviews to use with each culling split index.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.GPUResidentDrawer.UpdateInstanceOccluders(UnityEngine.Rendering.RenderGraphModule.RenderGraph,UnityEngine.Rendering.OccluderParameters@,System.ReadOnlySpan{UnityEngine.Rendering.OccluderSubviewUpdate})
member.summary: Utility function used to update occluders using a depth buffer. This function will dispatch compute shaders to read the given depth buffer and build a mip pyramid of closest depths for use during occlusion culling. The next time an occlusion test is issed for this view, instances will be tested against the updated occluders.
member.param: Render graph that will have a compute pass added.
Parameter to specify the view and depth buffer to read.
Specifies which occluder subviews to update from slices of the input depth buffer.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.GPUResidentDrawer.ReinitializeIfNeeded
member.summary: Enable or disable GPUResidentDrawer based on the project settings. We call this every frame because GPUResidentDrawer can be enabled/disabled by the settings outside the render pipeline asset.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.GPUResidentDrawer.RenderDebugOcclusionTestOverlay(UnityEngine.Rendering.RenderGraphModule.RenderGraph,UnityEngine.Rendering.DebugDisplayGPUResidentDrawer,UnityEngine.EntityId,UnityEngine.Rendering.RenderGraphModule.TextureHandle)
member.summary: Utility function to render an occlusion test heatmap debug overlay.
member.param: Render graph that will have a compute pass added.
The rendering debugger debug settings to read parameters from.
The instance ID of the camera using a GPU occlusion test.
The color buffer to render the overlay on.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.GPUResidentDrawer.RenderDebugOccluderOverlay(UnityEngine.Rendering.RenderGraphModule.RenderGraph,UnityEngine.Rendering.DebugDisplayGPUResidentDrawer,UnityEngine.Vector2,System.Single,UnityEngine.Rendering.RenderGraphModule.TextureHandle)
member.summary: Utility function visualise the occluder pyramid in a debug overlay.
member.param: Render graph that will have a compute pass added.
The rendering debugger debug settings to read parameters from.
The screen position to render the overlay at.
The maximum screen height of the overlay.
The color buffer to render the overlay on.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.GPUResidentDrawer.IsForcedOnViaCommandLine
member.summary: Is GRD forced on via the command line via -force-gpuresidentdrawer. Editor only.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.GPUResidentDrawer.IsOcclusionForcedOnViaCommandLine
member.summary: Is occlusion culling forced on via the command line via -force-gpuocclusion. Editor only.

member.name: T:UnityEngine.Rendering.GPUResidentDrawerResources
member.summary: Class for tracking resources used by the GPUResidentDrawer

member.name: P:UnityEngine.Rendering.GPUResidentDrawerResources.instanceDataBufferCopyKernels
member.summary: InstanceDataBufferCopyKernels compute shader reference

member.name: P:UnityEngine.Rendering.GPUResidentDrawerResources.instanceDataBufferUploadKernels
member.summary: InstanceDataBufferUploadKernels compute shader reference

member.name: P:UnityEngine.Rendering.GPUResidentDrawerResources.transformUpdaterKernels
member.summary: TransformUpdaterKernels compute shader reference

member.name: P:UnityEngine.Rendering.GPUResidentDrawerResources.windDataUpdaterKernels
member.summary: InstanceWindDataUpdateKernels compute shader reference

member.name: P:UnityEngine.Rendering.GPUResidentDrawerResources.occluderDepthPyramidKernels
member.summary: OccluderDepthPyramidKernels compute shader reference

member.name: P:UnityEngine.Rendering.GPUResidentDrawerResources.instanceOcclusionCullingKernels
member.summary: InstanceOcclusionCullingKernels compute shader reference

member.name: P:UnityEngine.Rendering.GPUResidentDrawerResources.occlusionCullingDebugKernels
member.summary: OcclusionCullingDebugKernels compute shader reference

member.name: P:UnityEngine.Rendering.GPUResidentDrawerResources.debugOcclusionTestPS
member.summary: DebugOcclusionTestPS pixel shader reference

member.name: P:UnityEngine.Rendering.GPUResidentDrawerResources.debugOccluderPS
member.summary: DebugOccluderPS pixel shader reference

member.name: T:UnityEngine.Rendering.GPUResidentDrawerMode
member.summary: Modes for improved draw submission.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.Rendering.GPUResidentDrawerMode.Disabled
member.summary: Default mode, GPU resident drawer will be disabled.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.Rendering.GPUResidentDrawerMode.InstancedDrawing
member.summary: If used, the BatchRendererGroup will be used for draw submission whenever possible.

member.name: T:UnityEngine.Rendering.GPUResidentDrawerSettings
member.summary: Utility struct to pass GPU resident drawer settings together

member.name: F:UnityEngine.Rendering.GPUResidentDrawerSettings.mode
member.summary: Serialized settings of GPUResidentDrawer

member.name: F:UnityEngine.Rendering.GPUResidentDrawerSettings.supportDitheringCrossFade
member.summary: Does the implementor support dithered crossfade

member.name: F:UnityEngine.Rendering.GPUResidentDrawerSettings.enableOcclusionCulling
member.summary: Enable GPU data for occlusion culling

member.name: F:UnityEngine.Rendering.GPUResidentDrawerSettings.allowInEditMode
member.summary: Allows the GPU Resident Drawer to run in edit mode

member.name: F:UnityEngine.Rendering.GPUResidentDrawerSettings.smallMeshScreenPercentage
member.summary: Default minimum screen percentage (0-20%) gpu-driven Renderers can cover before getting culled.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.Rendering.GPUResidentDrawerSettings.pickingShader
member.summary: Shader used if no custom picking pass has been implemented

member.name: F:UnityEngine.Rendering.GPUResidentDrawerSettings.errorShader
member.summary: Shader used when an error is detected

member.name: F:UnityEngine.Rendering.GPUResidentDrawerSettings.loadingShader
member.summary: Shader used while compiling shaders

member.name: T:UnityEngine.Rendering.IGPUResidentRenderPipeline
member.summary: Interface that can be added to a RenderPipelineAsset which indicates that it can support the GPUResidentDrawer.

member.name: P:UnityEngine.Rendering.IGPUResidentRenderPipeline.gpuResidentDrawerSettings
member.summary: Gets the GPU resident drawer settings

member.name: P:UnityEngine.Rendering.IGPUResidentRenderPipeline.gpuResidentDrawerMode
member.summary: The mode the GPUResidentDrawer is configured for on this RenderPipeline

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.IGPUResidentRenderPipeline.ReinitializeGPUResidentDrawer
member.summary: Callback for use when the GPUResidentDrawer needs to be reinitialized.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.IGPUResidentRenderPipeline.IsGPUResidentDrawerSupportedBySRP(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Is the GPU resident drawer supported on this render pipeline.
member.param: Should the reason for non support be logged?

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.IGPUResidentRenderPipeline.IsGPUResidentDrawerSupportedBySRP(System.String@,UnityEngine.LogType@)
member.summary: Is the GPU resident drawer supported on this render pipeline.
member.param: Why the system is not supported
The severity of the message

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.IGPUResidentRenderPipeline.IsGPUResidentDrawerSupportedByProjectConfiguration(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Is GPUResidentDrawer supported on this current configuration?
member.param: Should the reason for non support be logged?

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.IGPUResidentRenderPipeline.IsGPUResidentDrawerEnabled
member.summary: Is GPUResidentDrawer currently enabled

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.AABB.ToString
member.summary: Returns a string representation of the AABB.

member.name: T:UnityEngine.Rendering.BatchLayer
member.summary: Predefined batch layer values used by the GPU Resident Drawer.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.Rendering.BatchLayer.InstanceCullingDirect
member.summary: Batch layer for BatchRendererGroup direct draw commands produced by the GPU Resident Drawer.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.Rendering.BatchLayer.InstanceCullingIndirect
member.summary: Batch layer for BatchRendererGroup indirect draw commands produced by the GPU Resident Drawer.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.Rendering.BatchLayer.InstanceCullingDirectMask
member.summary: A batch layer mask to include BatchRendererGroup direct draw commands produced by the GPU Resident Drawer. Batch layer masks can be used to filter the set of draw calls in a renderer list.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.Rendering.BatchLayer.InstanceCullingIndirectMask
member.summary: A batch layer mask to include BatchRendererGroup indirect draw commands produced by the GPU Resident Drawer. Batch layer masks can be used to filter the set of draw calls in a renderer list.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.Rendering.BatchLayer.InstanceCullingMask
member.summary: A batch layer mask to include BatchRendererGroup direct and indirect draw commands produced by the GPU Resident Drawer. Batch layer masks can be used to filter the set of draw calls in a renderer list.

member.name: T:UnityEngine.Rendering.RenderRequestBatcherContext
member.summary: Context struct for passing into GPUResidentDrawer.PostCullBeginCameraRendering

member.name: F:UnityEngine.Rendering.RenderRequestBatcherContext.commandBuffer
member.summary: CommandBuffer that will be used for resulting commands

member.name: T:UnityEngine.Rendering.OcclusionTest
member.summary: The type of occlusion test

member.name: F:UnityEngine.Rendering.OcclusionTest.None
member.summary: No occlusion test, all instances are visible.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.Rendering.OcclusionTest.TestAll
member.summary: Test all instances against the latest occluders.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.Rendering.OcclusionTest.TestCulled
member.summary: Only test the culled objects from the previous pass.

member.name: T:UnityEngine.Rendering.OcclusionTestMethods
member.summary: Extension methods for OcclusionTest.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.OcclusionTestMethods.GetBatchLayerMask(UnityEngine.Rendering.OcclusionTest)
member.summary: Converts this occlusion test into a batch layer mask for rendering. This helper function is used to limit the second rendering pass when building occluders to only indirect draw calls, so that only false positives from the first rendering pass are rendered.
member.param: The occlusion test.
member.returns: The batch layer mask that should be used to render the results of this occlusion test.

member.name: T:UnityEngine.Rendering.SubviewOcclusionTest
member.summary: Parameter structure for passing to GPUResidentDrawer.InstanceOcclusionTest.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.Rendering.SubviewOcclusionTest.cullingSplitIndex
member.summary: The split index to read from the CPU culling output.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.Rendering.SubviewOcclusionTest.occluderSubviewIndex
member.summary: The occluder subview to occlusion test against.

member.name: T:UnityEngine.Rendering.OcclusionCullingSettings
member.summary: Parameter structure for passing to GPUResidentDrawer.InstanceOcclusionTest.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.Rendering.OcclusionCullingSettings.viewInstanceID
member.summary: The instance ID of the camera, to identify the culling output and occluders to use.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.Rendering.OcclusionCullingSettings.occlusionTest
member.summary: The occlusion test to use.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.Rendering.OcclusionCullingSettings.instanceMultiplier
member.summary: An instance multiplier to use for the generated indirect draw calls.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.OcclusionCullingSettings.#ctor(UnityEngine.EntityId,UnityEngine.Rendering.OcclusionTest)
member.summary: Creates a new structure using the given parameters.
member.param: The instance ID of the camera to find culling output and occluders for.
The occlusion test to use.

member.name: T:UnityEngine.Rendering.OccluderSubviewUpdate
member.summary: Parameters structure for passing to GPUResidentDrawer.UpdateInstanceOccluders.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.Rendering.OccluderSubviewUpdate.subviewIndex
member.summary: The subview index within this camera or light, used to identify these occluders for the occlusion test.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.Rendering.OccluderSubviewUpdate.depthSliceIndex
member.summary: The slice index of the depth data to read.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.Rendering.OccluderSubviewUpdate.depthOffset
member.summary: The offset in pixels to the start of the depth data to read.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.Rendering.OccluderSubviewUpdate.viewMatrix
member.summary: The transform from world space to view space when rendering the depth buffer.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.Rendering.OccluderSubviewUpdate.invViewMatrix
member.summary: The transform from view space to world space when rendering the depth buffer.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.Rendering.OccluderSubviewUpdate.gpuProjMatrix
member.summary: The GPU projection matrix when rendering the depth buffer.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.Rendering.OccluderSubviewUpdate.viewOffsetWorldSpace
member.summary: An additional world space offset to apply when moving between world space and view space.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.OccluderSubviewUpdate.#ctor(System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a new structure using the given parameters.
member.param: The index of the subview within this occluder.

member.name: T:UnityEngine.Rendering.OccluderParameters
member.summary: Parameters structure for passing to GPUResidentDrawer.UpdateInstanceOccluders.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.Rendering.OccluderParameters.viewInstanceID
member.summary: The instance ID of the camera, used to identify these occluders for the occlusion test.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.Rendering.OccluderParameters.subviewCount
member.summary: The total number of subviews for this occluder.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.Rendering.OccluderParameters.depthTexture
member.summary: The depth texture to read.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.Rendering.OccluderParameters.depthSize
member.summary: The size in pixels of the area of the depth data to read.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.Rendering.OccluderParameters.depthIsArray
member.summary: True if the depth texture is a texture array, false otherwise.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.OccluderParameters.#ctor(UnityEngine.EntityId)
member.summary: Creates a new structure using the given parameters.
member.param: The instance ID of the camera to associate with these occluders.

member.name: T:UnityEngine.Rendering.DebugDisplayGPUResidentDrawer
member.summary: GPU Resident Drawer Rendering Debugger settings.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.DebugDisplayGPUResidentDrawer.GetOccluderViewInstanceID(UnityEngine.EntityId@)
member.summary: Returns the view instances id for the selected occluder debug view index, or 0 if not valid.

member.name: P:UnityEngine.Rendering.DebugDisplayGPUResidentDrawer.occlusionTestOverlayEnable
member.summary: Returns if the occlusion test heatmap debug overlay is enabled.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.Rendering.DebugDisplayGPUResidentDrawer.occluderDebugViewEnable
member.summary: Returns true if the occluder debug overlay is enabled.
